testimonials.disclaimer: GDPR compliant. All cases are anonymized.

1.quote: Twelve doctors in eight years. Each treated a fragment. No one saw the pattern. Dr. Erkin found HPA-axis exhaustion in the first session. Six months later, I'm living again.

2.quote: Two burnouts. Antidepressants stopped working. 6D diagnostics revealed what no one checked — cellular energy collapse. Three months later, I'm running my company again.

3.quote: Rheumatologist — nothing. Neurologist — nothing. Gastroenterologist — nothing. Dr. Erkin connected dots others missed. Finally, a diagnosis that makes sense.

4.quote: Brain fog, fatigue, palpitations — doctors said to wait. The 6D protocol directly addressed autonomic dysfunction. I got my brain back.

5.quote: I spent €40,000 on treatments that didn't work. A €100 diagnostic session showed what everyone missed: my pain wasn't psychological — it was neuroinflammation.

6.quote: TSH was perfect, but I couldn't get out of bed. Dr. Erkin explained T4 to T3 conversion at the cellular level. No other doctor had mentioned it.

7.quote: Six years of diets, pills, and tests. Dr. Erkin found the gut–brain connection no one was looking for. Four months later, I'm eating normally.

8.quote: Ten years of migraines. MRI clear, pills don't help. 6D analysis revealed cervical dysfunction and dietary triggers. Finally living without the fear of pain.

trust.title: Experience & Trust
trust.gdpr: Compliant with GDPR data protection standards

items.question: Why do I feel exhausted even after a full night's sleep?
items.answer: This type of fatigue is often not related to a lack of rest, but to mitochondrial dysfunction — a state of 'cellular hibernation.' 6D diagnostics helps to understand whether the cause lies in metabolic or neurological disturbances.

items.question: Why are my test results normal if I feel unwell?
items.answer: Standard tests look for acute pathologies, often missing functional failures. We look deeper than reference values to find the logic behind your symptoms.

items.question: What is HPA axis dysfunction and how does it affect energy?
items.answer: The HPA axis (hypothalamus-pituitary-adrenal) is the main stress regulator. Its disruption leads to a 'tired but wired' state, brain fog, and sleep disturbances. Restoring this axis is a priority in treating exhaustion.

items.question: Why doesn't a vacation help with professional burnout?
items.answer: Burnout is physiological resource depletion at the cellular level, not just psychological fatigue. A short rest cannot instantly restore neuroendocrine balance.

items.question: How does 6D diagnostics help with chronic pain?
items.answer: We look for systemic causes: neuroinflammation, biochemical deficiencies, or errors in movement patterns. Breaking the pain cycle is only possible through comprehensive action on all health vectors.

items.question: Can Long COVID symptoms go away on their own?
items.answer: In many patients, the body gets stuck in autonomous dysfunction mode. Without targeted regulation of the autonomic nervous system, symptoms can persist for months or years.

items.question: How does an online consultation work for complex cases?
items.answer: The session lasts 60 minutes. I study your medical history in advance to focus on finding connections between symptoms during the meeting and create a navigation map for your recovery.

items.question: What will I receive after the diagnostic session?
items.answer: You will get a clear understanding of the root causes of your condition and an individual action plan (roadmap), including lifestyle and nutrition corrections and recommendations for further therapy.
